message:
fix: Fix pointless discard and classmethod cls handling

- Use _ = &var instead of _ = var for variable discards in with
  statements and eval string vars to avoid "pointless discard of
  local constant" errors in Zig 0.15

- Fix classmethod cls handling to work with both @classmethod and
  @abc.abstractclassmethod decorators by mapping cls -> @This()

- Reduces test_abc errors from 12 to 7
